# Handoff contents at a glance

## Directly usable frozen inputs

- Exact top-50 archetype ranking and field shares.
- One reproducible 60-card representative list per archetype.
- Complete 361-locator source union.
- Complete 145-locator top-ten priority subset.
- Long-form and wide-form archetype/tag mappings.
- Complete note-model schemas and HTML/CSS templates.
- Mechanical-identity, natural-key, display-label, media, and update rules.
- Unit tests and source validation.

## Intentionally generated by the coding agent

- Official card names and complete structured mechanics for each locator.
- Exact-reprint merge groups and final mechanically distinct counts.
- Stable natural-key registry after human audit.
- Standard-wide same-name ambiguity groups and player-facing labels.
- Current display images and artwork crops.
- Final Anki package.

This separation avoids embedding stale API results or copyrighted images in the
handoff while retaining a fully reproducible tournament source snapshot.
